subcodes.title: Words to H.E. Warmeke, spoken on 1913-05-01
subcodes.first_line: The American people are not satisfied with their present day civilization. It is true that they have built a marvellous civilization of their own through giant-like forces
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @man's distinction from the animal, @need for cooperation; solitary existence not possible, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
